un.caen.model

Class Game

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.model.Game

  • public class Game
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the game logic for the battle game. This class manages the game grid, players, turns, and actions such as moving and attacking.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Game(int width, int height)
      Constructs a Game with a specified width and height for the grid.
      Game(int width, int height, java.util.List<Player> players)
      Constructs a Game with a specified width, height, and a list of players.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addPlayer(Player player)
      Adds a player to the game.
      java.lang.Boolean BombMineAttack(Player player, Weapon weapon, Direction direction)
      Handles a bomb or mine attack from a player in a specified direction.
      void clearTrace()
      Clears all trace items from the grid.
      Player getCurrentPlayer()
      Gets the current player whose turn it is.
      Grid getGrid()
      Gets the game grid.
      java.util.List<Player> getPlayers()
      Gets the list of players in the game.
      java.lang.Boolean GunAttack(Player player, Weapon weapon, Direction direction)
      Handles a gun attack from a player in a specified direction.
      java.lang.Boolean handleAttack(Player player, Weapon weapon, Direction direction)
      Handles attacking with a specified weapon in a given direction.
      java.lang.Boolean handleMove(Player player, Direction direction)
      Handles moving a player in a specified direction.
      void nextTurn()
      Advances to the next player's turn.
      void playerStatus()
      Displays the status of all players, including their positions and energies.
      void setPlayers(java.util.List<Player> players)
      Sets the list of players in the game.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Game

        public Game(int width,
            int height)
        Constructs a Game with a specified width and height for the grid.
        Parameters:
        width - the width of the game grid
        height - the height of the game grid

      • Game

        public Game(int width,
            int height,
            java.util.List<Player> players)
        Constructs a Game with a specified width, height, and a list of players.
        Parameters:
        width - the width of the game grid
        height - the height of the game grid
        players - the list of players participating in the game

    • Method Detail

      • nextTurn

        public void nextTurn()
        Advances to the next player's turn.

      • getCurrentPlayer

        public Player getCurrentPlayer()
        Gets the current player whose turn it is.
        Returns:
        the current Player

      • getGrid

        public Grid getGrid()
        Gets the game grid.
        Returns:
        the Grid object representing the game grid

      • getPlayers

        public java.util.List<Player> getPlayers()
        Gets the list of players in the game.
        Returns:
        the list of Player objects

      • setPlayers

        public void setPlayers(java.util.List<Player> players)
        Sets the list of players in the game.
        Parameters:
        players - the new list of Player objects

      • addPlayer

        public void addPlayer(Player player)
        Adds a player to the game.
        Parameters:
        player - the Player to add

      • playerStatus

        public void playerStatus()
        Displays the status of all players, including their positions and energies.

      • handleMove

        public java.lang.Boolean handleMove(Player player,
                                    Direction direction)
        Handles moving a player in a specified direction.
        Parameters:
        player - the Player to move
        direction - the direction to move the player
        Returns:
        true if the move was successful, false otherwise

      • handleAttack

        public java.lang.Boolean handleAttack(Player player,
                                      Weapon weapon,
                                      Direction direction)
        Handles attacking with a specified weapon in a given direction.
        Parameters:
        player - the Player performing the attack
        weapon - the Weapon used for the attack
        direction - the direction of the attack
        Returns:
        true if the attack was successful, false otherwise

      • GunAttack

        public java.lang.Boolean GunAttack(Player player,
                                   Weapon weapon,
                                   Direction direction)
        Handles a gun attack from a player in a specified direction.
        Parameters:
        player - the Player performing the attack
        weapon - the Gun used for the attack
        direction - the direction of the attack
        Returns:
        true if the attack was successful, false otherwise

      • BombMineAttack

        public java.lang.Boolean BombMineAttack(Player player,
                                        Weapon weapon,
                                        Direction direction)
        Handles a bomb or mine attack from a player in a specified direction.
        Parameters:
        player - the Player performing the attack
        weapon - the Bomb or Mine used for the attack
        direction - the direction of the attack
        Returns:
        true if the attack was successful, false otherwise

      • clearTrace

        public void clearTrace()
        Clears all trace items from the grid.
